sections.title: Has To / Have To — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Has To / Have To — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Has To / Have To is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity). Rules: 'Have to' is used with I, you, we, they; 'Has to' is used with he, she, it | Shows obligation that comes from outside (rules, circumstances), not personal opinion | Negative: do not have to / does not have to (means 'not necessary', not prohibition) | Question: Do/Does + subject + have to...?
sections.formula: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)

examples.hindi: मुझे रोज़ ऑफिस जाना पड़ता है।
examples.english: I have to go to office every day.

examples.hindi: उसे यह काम पूरा करना पड़ता है।
examples.english: He has to complete this work.

examples.hindi: हमें नियमों का पालन करना पड़ता है।
examples.english: We have to follow the rules.

examples.hindi: उसे रोज़ जल्दी उठना पड़ता है।
examples.english: She has to wake up early every day.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम्हें यह करना पड़ता है?
examples.english: Do you have to do this?

examples.hindi: उसे बहुत मेहनत करनी पड़ती है।
examples.english: He has to work very hard.

sections.title: Has To / Have To — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Has To / Have To — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Has To / Have To for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)

examples.hindi: मुझे यह पैसे देने पड़ते हैं।
examples.english: I have to pay this money.

examples.hindi: हमें फॉर्म भरना पड़ता है।
examples.english: We have to fill the form.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें ऐसा नहीं करना पड़ता (जरूरी नहीं है)।
examples.english: You do not have to do this.

examples.hindi: उसे सबूत देना पड़ता है।
examples.english: She has to give proof.

examples.hindi: क्या उसे भी आना पड़ता है?
examples.english: Does he have to come too?

examples.hindi: हमें टैक्स भरना पड़ता है।
examples.english: We have to pay tax.

sections.title: Has To / Have To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Has To / Have To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Has To / Have To in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)

examples.hindi: मुझे यह test देना पड़ता है।
examples.english: I have to give this test.

examples.hindi: उसे रोज़ दवा लेनी पड़ती है।
examples.english: He has to take medicine daily.

examples.hindi: तुम्हें अनुमति लेनी पड़ती है।
examples.english: You have to take permission.

examples.hindi: हमें सुरक्षा नियमों का पालन करना पड़ता है।
examples.english: We have to follow safety rules.

sections.title: Has To / Have To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Has To / Have To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Has To / Have To. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + has to/have to + base verb (external obligation/necessity)

examples.hindi: उसे यह decision लेना पड़ता है।
examples.english: She has to make this decision.

examples.hindi: मुझे ID दिखानी पड़ती है।
examples.english: I have to show my ID.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम्हें फीस देनी पड़ती है?
examples.english: Do you have to pay fees?

examples.hindi: उसे यह जिम्मेदारी लेनी पड़ती है।
examples.english: He has to take this responsibility.
